name: BackupSheep
description: Self-hosted backup automation for databases, websites, servers, and cloud infrastructure.

DJANGO_SECRET_KEY.description: A generated cryptographic signing key for this installation.

ONBOARDING_INSTALL_TOKEN.description: Choose a long private token. You will enter it once in BackupSheep's first-run wizard.

APP_DOMAIN.description: The exact public hostname, without https:// (for example, your-app.herokuapp.com or backups.example.com).

DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: Comma-separated accepted hosts. Keep .herokuapp.com for the default Heroku domain; add any custom domain after deployment.
